mapper.sql: SELECT a.batch_code, a.status as batch_status, a.clean_status, b.data_id, b.data_type, b.data_code, b.original_name, b.original_province, b.original_address, b.company_name, b.haosen_code, b.add_time, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY a.batch_code) > 1 THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS duplicate_flag FROM data_batch AS a LEFT JOIN origin_data AS b ON a.batch_code = b.batch_code
mapper.select:
AND a.batch_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.batchCode}, '%')
AND a.status = #{condition.batchStatus}
AND a.clean_status = #{condition.cleanStatus}
AND b.data_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.dataId}, '%')
AND b.data_type = #{condition.dataType}
AND b.data_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.dataCode}, '%')
AND b.original_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.originalName}, '%')
AND b.original_province LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.originalProvince}, '%')
AND b.haosen_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.haosenCode}, '%')
ORDER BY add_time DESC
OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 100 ROWS ONLY
